description: Create GitHub Actions workflows for CI with Docker builds + security scanning, deploy-staging, deploy-production with approval gate, and security scanning workflow.
steps: Update .github/workflows/ci.yml - Add Docker build matrix for all services (build but don't push), add Trivy container scan step, add npm audit step. Keep existing lint/typecheck/test/build steps.

Create .github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml - Triggered on merge to main. Builds and pushes Docker images to ECR, updates Helm values, deploys to staging EKS cluster via helm upgrade. Includes smoke tests post-deploy.

Create .github/workflows/deploy-production.yml - Manual trigger with environment approval gate. Promotes staging images to production, deploys via ArgoCD sync or helm upgrade, includes canary/rollback logic.

Create .github/workflows/security-scan.yml - Scheduled (weekly) + on PR. Runs Trivy filesystem scan, npm audit --audit-level=high, OWASP ZAP baseline scan against staging, reports findings as PR comments or issues.
acceptance_criteria: ci.yml includes Docker build step for all services
deploy-staging.yml triggers on push to main
deploy-staging.yml builds, pushes images, and deploys to staging
security-scan.yml runs Trivy, npm audit, and OWASP ZAP
All workflows use proper GitHub Actions syntax with jobs, steps, actions
verification: Verify all workflow YAML files have valid GitHub Actions syntax
Run pnpm turbo build to ensure no existing code was broken
